exam_format: Digital (computer-based) adaptive test delivered via Bluebook app. Two sections: Reading and Writing; Math. Multistage adaptive testing: performance on Module 1 determines difficulty of Module 2.
exam_price_notes: DISCONTINUED as of 2021. No longer offered.

testing_centers.notes: Computer-based digital SAT at authorized test centers worldwide. School-day SAT administered at schools. Register at collegeboard.org/register.

id_requirements: Acceptable ID includes: school ID with photo, government-issued photo ID, or College Board admission ticket with photo. Name must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: No unauthorized aids, phones, or smartwatches permitted. Approved calculators permitted for the Math section (built-in Desmos graphing calculator available digitally). Digital SAT delivered via Bluebook app on College Board-approved devices.
renewal_options: SAT scores are valid for 5 years; some colleges accept scores indefinitely.

retake_policy.notes: Students may retake the SAT as many times as they choose. Scores are valid for 5 years (some colleges accept older scores). Score Choice: students may choose which scores to send to colleges. Superscoring (using best section scores across multiple attempts) is accepted by many colleges.

official_study_resources.title: Official SAT Practice on Khan Academy
official_study_resources.notes: Free full-length practice tests and personalized practice; official partnership with College Board

official_study_resources.title: Bluebook Practice Tests
official_study_resources.notes: Free full-length digital practice tests in the official Bluebook app
